class.label: Liquidacion DDO
class.name: LIQUIDACION_DDO

qry:select.name: sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql('SELECT t0.oi_liquidacion_ddo as oi_liquidacion_ddo, t0.c_empresa as c_empresa, t0.c_liquidacion as c_liquidacion, t0.d_titulo as d_titulo, t0.f_liquidacion as f_liquidacion, t0.e_quincena as e_quincena, t0.e_periodo as e_periodo, t0.e_periodo_ret as e_periodo_ret, t0.f_valor as f_valor, t0.f_cierre as f_cierre, t0.c_forma_pago as c_forma_pago, t0.c_tipo_liq as c_tipo_liq, t0.f_deposito as f_deposito, t0.c_mes_deposito as c_mes_deposito, t0.f_pago as f_pago, t0.c_estado as c_estado, t0.c_clase as c_clase, t0.l_retroactivo as l_retroactivo, t0.c_banco as c_banco, t0.d_banco as d_banco, t0.l_ajuste as l_ajuste, t0.c_liquidacion as CODE, t0.d_titulo as TEXT, t0.oi_empresa_ddo as oi_empresa_ddo, t0.oi_var_ejec_ddo as oi_var_ejec_ddo, t0.oi_cab_conc_ddo as oi_cab_conc_ddo, t0.oi_codif_ddo as oi_codif_ddo FROM LIQ99_LIQUIDACION as t0 ORDER BY oi_liquidacion_ddo asc')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql('SELECT t0.oi_liquidacion_ddo as oi_liquidacion_ddo FROM LIQ99_LIQUIDACION as t0 ORDER BY oi_liquidacion_ddo asc')/ROWS/ROW

attribute.label: Fecha Valor para el pase Contable
attribute.name: FechaPaseContable

form-properties.label: Fecha Valor para el pase Contable

attribute.description: Código de Forma de Pago. Puede ser alfanumérico de hasta 30 caracteres.
attribute.label: Código Forma Pago
attribute.name: FormaDePago

attribute.label: Fecha de Pago de la Liquidación
attribute.name: FechaPago

form-properties.label: Fecha de Pago de la Liquidación

assosiation.name: VariablesNovedad
assosiation.description: Valores de los variables de Generales Novedad
assosiation.label: Valores Variables Generales de Novedad Liquidacion

qry:select.name: RS1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in table('select oi_tot_liq_per from liq20_tot_liq_per where oi_liquidacion = {#SOURCE:@oi_liquidacion} and oi_personal_emp = {#SOURCE:@oi_personal_emp}')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: RS1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in table('select * from LIQ16_ERRORES')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: RS1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in table('select * from liq04_items_ig')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in sql('SELECT tr.c_empresa AS c_empresa, t.c_liquidacion , t.d_titulo , t.f_liquidacion , t.e_quincena , t.e_periodo , t.e_periodo_ret , t.f_valor , t.f_cierre , tf.c_forma_pago , tt.c_tipo_liq , tb.c_banco , tb.d_banco , t.f_deposito , t.c_mes_deposito , t.f_pago , t.c_estado , t.c_clase , t.l_ajuste, t.l_retroactivo
FROM LIQ19_LIQUIDACION as t, LIQ93_EMPRESAS as tr, PER31_FORMAS_PAGO as tf, LIQ01_TIPOS_LIQ as tt, LIQ22_BANCOS as tb JOIN t.oi_forma_pago LEFT OUTER tf.oi_forma_pago, t.oi_tipo_liq LEFT OUTER tt.oi_tipo_liq, t.oi_banco LEFT OUTER tb.oi_banco WHERE tr.oi_empresa_ddo = {%= #PARAM:@oi_empresa_ddo %} and t.oi_liquidacion = {%= #PARAM:@oi_liquidacion %}')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: sql2
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql('SELECT t.n_valor , t.o_val_vargn, tt.oi_variable_ddo, tt.c_variable FROM LIQ95_VARIABLES as tt, liq09_variables as tv, LIQ19_VAL_VARGN as t JOIN tv.c_variable inner tt.c_variable, t.oi_variable inner tv.oi_variable WHERE t.oi_liquidacion={#PARAM:@oi_liquidacion} and tt.oi_var_ejec_ddo = {#PARAM:@oi_var_ejec_ddo} ORDER BY c_variable ASC')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: PERSONAS
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in SQL(' select PER01_PERSONAL.oi_personal, PER01_PERSONAL.d_ape_y_nom, PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_personal_emp, PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.e_numero_legajo, LIQ25_PERSONAL_LIQ.oi_personal_liq from PER01_PERSONAL, PER02_PERSONAL_EMP, LIQ25_PERSONAL_LIQ join PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_personal_emp inner LIQ25_PERSONAL_LIQ.oi_personal_emp, PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_personal inner PER01_PERSONAL.oi_personal where LIQ25_PERSONAL_LIQ.oi_liquidacion={#SOURCE:@oi_liquidacion} ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: RECIBOS
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in SQL(' select RC.f_cierre, PE.e_numero_legajo from LIQ19_EJECUCIONES as EJ, LIQ99_LIQUIDACION as LD, LIQ99_RECIBOS as RE, LIQ20_TOT_LIQ_PER as RC, LIQ97_PERSONAL_EMP as PE join EJ.oi_liquidacion_ddo inner LD.oi_liquidacion_ddo, RE.oi_liquidacion_ddo inner LD.oi_liquidacion_ddo, RE.oi_tot_liq_per inner RC.oi_tot_liq_per, PE.oi_per_emp_ddo inner RC.oi_per_emp_ddo where LD.c_estado=\'F\' and EJ.oi_liquidacion={%= #SOURCE:@oi_liquidacion %} ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: PERSONAS
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in SQL(' select PL.oi_personal_liq as ID, PL.oi_personal_emp, PE.e_numero_legajo, PP.d_ape_y_nom from LIQ25_PERSONAL_LIQ as PL, PER02_PERSONAL_EMP as PE, PER01_PERSONAL as PP join PL.oi_personal_emp inner PE.oi_personal_emp, PE.oi_personal inner PP.oi_personal where PL.oi_liquidacion={#PARAM:@oi_liquidacion} order by e_numero_legajo ASC ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: RECIBOS
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in SQL(' select RE.oi_recibo as ID, RE.oi_tot_liq_per, RC.e_secuencia, RC.f_cierre, EJ.oi_liquidacion_ddo, PE.e_numero_legajo, PE.d_ape_y_nom, RE.d_hash as RECIBO_HASH, PE.h_hash as PER_EMP_HASH, PL.h_hash as PER_LIQ_HASH from LIQ19_EJECUCIONES as EJ, LIQ99_LIQUIDACION as LD, LIQ99_RECIBOS as RE, LIQ20_TOT_LIQ_PER as RC, LIQ97_PERSONAL_EMP as PE, LIQ98_PERSONAL_LIQ as PL join EJ.oi_liquidacion_ddo inner LD.oi_liquidacion_ddo, RE.oi_liquidacion_ddo inner LD.oi_liquidacion_ddo, RE.oi_tot_liq_per inner RC.oi_tot_liq_per, PE.oi_per_emp_ddo inner RC.oi_per_emp_ddo, PL.oi_per_liq_ddo inner RC.oi_per_liq_ddo where LD.c_estado=\'F\' and EJ.oi_liquidacion={#PARAM:@oi_liquidacion} order by e_numero_legajo ASC ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: LIQUIDACION
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in SQL(' select EJ.oi_liquidacion_ddo as ID from LIQ19_EJECUCIONES as EJ, LIQ99_LIQUIDACION as LD join EJ.oi_liquidacion_ddo inner LD.oi_liquidacion_ddo where LD.c_estado=\'F\' and EJ.oi_liquidacion={#PARAM:@oi_liquidacion} ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: EJECUCIONES
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in SQL(' select EJ.oi_liquidacion_ddo as ID, EJ.e_secuencia, LD.oi_empresa_ddo, LD.oi_var_ejec_ddo, LD.oi_cab_conc_ddo, LD.oi_codif_ddo from LIQ19_EJECUCIONES as EJ, LIQ99_LIQUIDACION as LD join EJ.oi_liquidacion_ddo inner LD.oi_liquidacion_ddo where EJ.oi_liquidacion={#PARAM:@oi_liquidacion} ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: VARIABLES
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in SQL(' select VA.oi_variable, VA.c_variable from LIQ09_VARIABLES as VA ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: SINUSO
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in SQL('maxsize 30000 select LIQ94_CODIF.oi_codif_ddo from LIQ94_CODIF where LIQ94_CODIF.oi_codif_ddo not in (select LIQ94_ITEMS_IG.oi_codif_ddo from LIQ94_ITEMS_IG, LIQ20_VALIG where LIQ94_ITEMS_IG.oi_item_ddo=LIQ94_ITEMS_IG.oi_item_ddo group by LIQ94_ITEMS_IG.oi_codif_ddo) and LIQ94_CODIF.oi_codif_ddo not in (select LIQ94_ITEMS_IG.oi_codif_ddo from LIQ94_ITEMS_IG, LIQ20_AJDIG where LIQ94_ITEMS_IG.oi_item_ddo=LIQ94_ITEMS_IG.oi_item_ddo group by LIQ94_ITEMS_IG.oi_codif_ddo) and LIQ94_CODIF.oi_codif_ddo not in (select LIQ99_LIQUIDACION.oi_codif_ddo from LIQ99_LIQUIDACION group by LIQ99_LIQUIDACION.oi_codif_ddo)')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: ANTIG
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in SQL('maxsize 10000 select LIQ99_LIQUIDACION.oi_codif_ddo, max(LIQ99_LIQUIDACION.f_cierre) as f_cierre from LIQ99_LIQUIDACION where isnotnull(LIQ99_LIQUIDACION.f_cierre) group by LIQ99_LIQUIDACION.oi_codif_ddo order by f_cierre asc')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: SINUSO
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in SQL('maxsize 30000 select LIQ96_CONCEPTOS.oi_cab_conc_ddo from LIQ96_CONCEPTOS where LIQ96_CONCEPTOS.oi_concepto_ddo not in (select LIQ98_CONC_MAN_PER.oi_concepto_ddo from LIQ98_CONC_MAN_PER) and LIQ96_CONCEPTOS.oi_concepto_ddo not in (select LIQ20_ERRORES_LIQ.oi_concepto_ddo from LIQ20_ERRORES_LIQ) and LIQ96_CONCEPTOS.oi_concepto_ddo not in (select LIQ20_CONC_LIQ_PER.oi_concepto_ddo from LIQ20_CONC_LIQ_PER) and LIQ96_CONCEPTOS.oi_cab_conc_ddo not in (select LIQ99_LIQUIDACION.oi_cab_conc_ddo from LIQ99_LIQUIDACION) group by LIQ96_CONCEPTOS.oi_cab_conc_ddo order by oi_cab_conc_ddo ASC ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: ANTIG
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in SQL('maxsize 10000 select LIQ99_LIQUIDACION.oi_cab_conc_ddo, max(LIQ99_LIQUIDACION.f_cierre) as f_cierre from LIQ99_LIQUIDACION where isnotnull(LIQ99_LIQUIDACION.f_cierre) group by LIQ99_LIQUIDACION.oi_cab_conc_ddo order by f_cierre asc')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: SINUSO
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in SQL(' maxsize 30000 select LIQ93_EMPRESAS.oi_empresa_ddo, LIQ93_EMPRESAS.c_empresa from LIQ93_EMPRESAS where LIQ93_EMPRESAS.oi_empresa_ddo not in (select LIQ99_LIQUIDACION.oi_empresa_ddo from LIQ99_LIQUIDACION group by LIQ99_LIQUIDACION.oi_empresa_ddo) ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: ANTIG
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in SQL('maxsize 10000 select LIQ99_LIQUIDACION.oi_empresa_ddo, max(LIQ99_LIQUIDACION.f_cierre) as f_cierre from LIQ99_LIQUIDACION where isnotnull(LIQ99_LIQUIDACION.f_cierre) group by LIQ99_LIQUIDACION.oi_empresa_ddo order by f_cierre asc')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: SINUSO
ANTIG
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in SQL(' maxsize 10000 select LIQ20_TOT_LIQ_PER.oi_tot_liq_per, LIQ20_TOT_LIQ_PER.f_cierre as f_cierre from LIQ20_TOT_LIQ_PER where isnotnull(LIQ20_TOT_LIQ_PER.f_cierre) order by f_cierre asc ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: SINUSO
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in SQL(' maxsize 30000 select LIQ99_LIQUIDACION.oi_liquidacion_ddo, LIQ19_EJECUCIONES.oi_liquidacion, LIQ19_EJECUCIONES.e_secuencia, LIQ99_LIQUIDACION.c_empresa, LIQ99_LIQUIDACION.c_liquidacion, LIQ19_EJECUCIONES.oi_ejecucion from LIQ99_LIQUIDACION, LIQ19_EJECUCIONES, LIQ19_LIQUIDACION join LIQ99_LIQUIDACION.oi_liquidacion_ddo inner LIQ19_EJECUCIONES.oi_liquidacion_ddo, LIQ19_LIQUIDACION.oi_liquidacion inner LIQ19_EJECUCIONES.oi_liquidacion where LIQ99_LIQUIDACION.c_estado!=\'F\' and LIQ19_LIQUIDACION.c_estado=\'C\' and LIQ99_LIQUIDACION.oi_liquidacion_ddo not in (select LIQ98_PERSONAL_LIQ.oi_liquidacion_ddo from LIQ98_PERSONAL_LIQ) and LIQ99_LIQUIDACION.oi_liquidacion_ddo not in (select LIQ20_TOT_LIQ_PER.oi_liquidacion_ddo from LIQ20_TOT_LIQ_PER) order by oi_liquidacion ASC ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: SINUSO2
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in SQL(' maxsize 30000 select LIQ99_LIQUIDACION.oi_liquidacion_ddo, LIQ99_LIQUIDACION.c_empresa, LIQ99_LIQUIDACION.c_liquidacion from LIQ99_LIQUIDACION, LIQ19_EJECUCIONES, LIQ19_LIQUIDACION join LIQ99_LIQUIDACION.oi_liquidacion_ddo inner LIQ19_EJECUCIONES.oi_liquidacion_ddo, LIQ19_LIQUIDACION.oi_liquidacion inner LIQ19_EJECUCIONES.oi_liquidacion where LIQ99_LIQUIDACION.c_estado!=\'F\' and LIQ19_LIQUIDACION.c_estado=\'C\' and LIQ99_LIQUIDACION.oi_liquidacion_ddo not in (select LIQ98_PERSONAL_LIQ.oi_liquidacion_ddo from LIQ98_PERSONAL_LIQ) and LIQ99_LIQUIDACION.oi_liquidacion_ddo not in (select LIQ20_TOT_LIQ_PER.oi_liquidacion_ddo from LIQ20_TOT_LIQ_PER) union select LIQ99_LIQUIDACION.oi_liquidacion_ddo, LIQ99_LIQUIDACION.c_empresa, LIQ99_LIQUIDACION.c_liquidacion from LIQ99_LIQUIDACION where LIQ99_LIQUIDACION.oi_liquidacion_ddo not in (select LIQ19_EJECUCIONES.oi_liquidacion_ddo from LIQ19_EJECUCIONES) ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: ANTIG
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in SQL('maxsize 10000 select LIQ99_LIQUIDACION.oi_liquidacion_ddo, LIQ99_LIQUIDACION.f_cierre from LIQ99_LIQUIDACION where isnotnull(LIQ99_LIQUIDACION.f_cierre) order by f_cierre asc')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: SINUSO
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in SQL(' maxsize 30000 select LIQ98_PERSONAL_LIQ.oi_per_liq_ddo, LIQ99_LIQUIDACION.c_liquidacion, LIQ99_LIQUIDACION.c_empresa, LIQ97_PERSONAL_EMP.d_ape_y_nom from LIQ98_PERSONAL_LIQ, LIQ99_LIQUIDACION, LIQ97_PERSONAL_EMP join LIQ98_PERSONAL_LIQ.oi_liquidacion_ddo inner LIQ99_LIQUIDACION.oi_liquidacion_ddo, LIQ98_PERSONAL_LIQ.oi_per_emp_ddo inner LIQ97_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_per_emp_ddo where LIQ98_PERSONAL_LIQ.oi_per_liq_ddo not in (select LIQ20_TOT_LIQ_PER.oi_per_liq_ddo from LIQ20_TOT_LIQ_PER where not(isNull(LIQ20_TOT_LIQ_PER.oi_per_liq_ddo))) ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: ANTIG
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in SQL('maxsize 10000 select LIQ98_PERSONAL_LIQ.oi_per_liq_ddo, LIQ19_LIQUIDACION.f_cierre from LIQ98_PERSONAL_LIQ, LIQ20_TOT_LIQ_PER, LIQ19_EJECUCIONES, LIQ19_LIQUIDACION join LIQ19_EJECUCIONES.oi_liquidacion inner LIQ19_LIQUIDACION.oi_liquidacion, LIQ19_EJECUCIONES.oi_liquidacion_ddo inner LIQ98_PERSONAL_LIQ.oi_liquidacion_ddo, LIQ98_PERSONAL_LIQ.oi_per_liq_ddo left outer LIQ20_TOT_LIQ_PER.oi_per_liq_ddo where isnotnull(LIQ19_LIQUIDACION.f_cierre) order by f_cierre asc')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: SINUSO
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in SQL(' maxsize 30000 select LIQ97_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_per_emp_ddo, LIQ97_PERSONAL_EMP.c_empresa, LIQ97_PERSONAL_EMP.d_ape_y_nom from LIQ97_PERSONAL_EMP where LIQ97_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_per_emp_ddo not in (select LIQ98_PERSONAL_LIQ.oi_per_emp_ddo from LIQ98_PERSONAL_LIQ) and LIQ97_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_per_emp_ddo not in (select LIQ20_TOT_LIQ_PER.oi_per_emp_ddo from LIQ20_TOT_LIQ_PER) and LIQ97_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_per_emp_ddo not in (select LIQ97_EMBARGOS.oi_per_emp_ddo from LIQ97_EMBARGOS,LIQ20_EMB_LIQ_PER where LIQ97_EMBARGOS.oi_embargo_ddo=LIQ20_EMB_LIQ_PER.oi_embargo_ddo) and LIQ97_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_per_emp_ddo not in (select LIQ97_ANTICIPOS.oi_per_emp_ddo from LIQ97_ANTICIPOS,LIQ20_ANT_LIQ_PER where LIQ97_ANTICIPOS.oi_anticipo_ddo=LIQ20_ANT_LIQ_PER.oi_anticipo_ddo) ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: ANTIG
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in SQL('maxsize 10000 select LIQ97_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_per_emp_ddo, LIQ20_TOT_LIQ_PER.f_cierre from LIQ97_PERSONAL_EMP, LIQ20_TOT_LIQ_PER where LIQ97_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_per_emp_ddo=LIQ20_TOT_LIQ_PER.oi_per_emp_ddo and isnotnull(LIQ20_TOT_LIQ_PER.f_cierre) order by f_cierre asc')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: RECIBOS
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in SQL(' maxsize 10000 select LIQ99_LIQUIDACION.oi_liquidacion_ddo, LIQ19_EJECUCIONES.oi_liquidacion, LIQ99_LIQUIDACION.c_liquidacion, LIQ19_EJECUCIONES.e_secuencia, LIQ99_LIQUIDACION.c_empresa from LIQ99_LIQUIDACION, LIQ99_RECIBOS, LIQ19_EJECUCIONES where LIQ99_LIQUIDACION.oi_liquidacion_ddo = LIQ99_RECIBOS.oi_liquidacion_ddo and LIQ99_LIQUIDACION.oi_liquidacion_ddo = LIQ19_EJECUCIONES.oi_liquidacion_ddo and LIQ99_LIQUIDACION.c_estado!=\'F\' group by LIQ99_LIQUIDACION.oi_liquidacion_ddo, LIQ19_EJECUCIONES.oi_liquidacion, LIQ99_LIQUIDACION.c_liquidacion, LIQ99_LIQUIDACION.c_empresa, LIQ19_EJECUCIONES.e_secuencia order by oi_liquidacion_ddo ASC ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: SINUSO
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in SQL('maxsize 10000 select LIQ95_VARIABLES.oi_var_ejec_ddo from LIQ95_VARIABLES where LIQ95_VARIABLES.oi_variable_ddo not in (select LIQ96_CONC_VAR.oi_variable_ddo from LIQ96_CONC_VAR) and LIQ95_VARIABLES.oi_variable_ddo not in (select LIQ93_VAL_VARGF.oi_variable_ddo from LIQ93_VAL_VARGF) and LIQ95_VARIABLES.oi_variable_ddo not in (select LIQ99_VAL_VARGN.oi_variable_ddo from LIQ99_VAL_VARGN) and LIQ95_VARIABLES.oi_var_ejec_ddo not in (select LIQ99_LIQUIDACION.oi_var_ejec_ddo from LIQ99_LIQUIDACION) group by LIQ95_VARIABLES.oi_var_ejec_ddo ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: ANTIG
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in SQL('maxsize 10000 select LIQ99_LIQUIDACION.oi_cab_conc_ddo, max(LIQ99_LIQUIDACION.f_cierre) as f_cierre from LIQ99_LIQUIDACION where isnotnull(LIQ99_LIQUIDACION.f_cierre) group by LIQ99_LIQUIDACION.oi_cab_conc_ddo order by f_cierre asc')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: RS1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in SQL(' select T.oi_per_emp_ddo, T.c_variable, T.n_valor_e from LIQ97_VAL_VAREA as T where T.oi_per_emp_ddo in ({%= #SOURCE:@oi_per_emp_ddo %}) ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: RS1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in SQL(' select T.oi_per_emp_ddo, T.c_variable, T.e_anno, T.n_valor_e_1, T.n_valor_e_2, T.n_valor_e_3, T.n_valor_e_4, T.n_valor_e_5, T.n_valor_e_6, T.n_valor_e_7, T.n_valor_e_8, T.n_valor_e_9, T.n_valor_e_10, T.n_valor_e_11, T.n_valor_e_12 from LIQ97_VAL_A_ANNO as T where T.oi_per_emp_ddo in ({%= #SOURCE:@oi_per_emp_ddo %}) ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: NucleusRH.Base.Liquidacion.LiquidacionDDO.LIQUIDACION_DDO.QUERY
NucleusRH.Base.Liquidacion.LiquidacionDDO.LIQUIDACION_DDO.COUNT
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in SQL(' select Count(LIQ99_LIQUIDACION.oi_liquidacion_ddo) as CNT from LIQ99_LIQUIDACION, ORG03_EMPRESAS JOIN LIQ99_LIQUIDACION.c_empresa INNER ORG03_EMPRESAS.c_empresa Where LIQ99_LIQUIDACION.c_estado = \'F\' {%? (#SOURCE:@OI_FIND='') {% %} {% and LIQ99_LIQUIDACION.oi_liquidacion_ddo={#SOURCE:@OI_FIND} %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND='') {% %} {% and (contain(LIQ99_LIQUIDACION.d_titulo,{#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND}) or contain(LIQ99_LIQUIDACION.c_liquidacion,{#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND})) %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@OI_PARENT='') {% %} {% and ORG03_EMPRESAS.oi_empresa={#SOURCE:@OI_PARENT} %} %}
{%? (#SOURCE:@WHERE='') {% %} {% and {%=#SOURCE:@WHERE %} %} %}')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: SQL1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in SQL(' select t.oi_liquidacion_ddo from liq99_liquidacion as t, liq19_ejecuciones as e join t.oi_liquidacion_ddo INNER e.oi_liquidacion_ddo where e.oi_liquidacion = {#PARAM:@oi_liquidacion} and t.c_estado = \'F\' order by oi_liquidacion_ddo DESC ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: RS1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in SQL(' select T.c_variable, T.e_anno, T.n_valor_e_1, T.n_valor_e_2, T.n_valor_e_3, T.n_valor_e_4, T.n_valor_e_5, T.n_valor_e_6, T.n_valor_e_7, T.n_valor_e_8, T.n_valor_e_9, T.n_valor_e_10, T.n_valor_e_11, T.n_valor_e_12 from LIQ97_VARPA_CARGO as T, LIQ97_CARGOS as C join T.oi_cargo_ddo inner C.oi_cargo_ddo where C.oi_cargo={#SOURCE:@oi_cargo} and C.oi_per_emp_ddo={#SOURCE:@oi_per_emp_ddo} ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: RS2
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in SQL(' select C.oi_cargo from LIQ97_CARGOS as C where C.oi_cargo={#SOURCE:@oi_cargo} and C.oi_per_emp_ddo={#SOURCE:@oi_per_emp_ddo} ')/ROWS/ROW

method.label: Comprime los archivos de recibo del servidor
method.name: ComprimirArchivosRecibo

qry:select.name: qry_periodos
qry_recibos
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in SQL(' SELECT LIQ20_TOT_LIQ_PER.oi_tot_liq_per FROM LIQ20_TOT_LIQ_PER, LIQ99_LIQUIDACION JOIN LIQ20_TOT_LIQ_PER.oi_liquidacion_ddo INNER LIQ99_LIQUIDACION.oi_liquidacion_ddo WHERE LIQ99_LIQUIDACION.e_periodo = {#SOURCE:@e_periodo} order by oi_tot_liq_per asc ')/ROWS/ROW

method.label: Comprime los archivos de recibo del servidor de un periodo
method.name: ComprimirArchivosReciboPeriodo

method.label: Descomprime un periodo de archivos de recibo
method.name: DescomprimirArchivosRecibo

qry:select.name: sql_split
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in split('200;{%=$SOURCE/ROW/@oi%}')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: qry_recibos
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in SQL(' SELECT LIQ20_TOT_LIQ_PER.oi_tot_liq_per FROM LIQ20_TOT_LIQ_PER WHERE LIQ20_TOT_LIQ_PER.oi_tot_liq_per in ({%=#SOURCE:@value%})
')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: qry_recorrer
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in #SOURCE:ROW

class.name: VAL_VARGN_DDO
class.help: Valores de los variables de Generales Novedad
class.description: Valores Variables Generales de Novedad Liquidacion
class.label: Valor Variable General Novedad DDO

qry:select.name: sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in #PARAM:

qry:select.name: sql2
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in table('SELECT LIQ99_VARIABLES.oi_variable_ddo oi_variable_ddo FROM LIQ99_VARIABLES WHERE LIQ99_VARIABLES.oi_variable_ddo={#PARAM:@value}')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in #PARAM:
